mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in housing units sold (HOUST) signals a strengthening demand for durable goods, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: HOUST fails to predict positive 5-day forward returns in > 50% of instances, or the signal's Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) signals a weakening supply chain, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO fails to predict negative 20-day forward returns in > 60% of instances, or the signal's Rank IC remains below 0.01 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in initial unemployment claims (UNRATE) signals a weakening labor market, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: UNRATE fails to predict negative 60-day forward returns in > 70% of instances, or the signal's Rank IC remains below 0.005 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in real disposable personal income (GDPC1) signals a strengthening demand for consumer goods, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 fails to predict positive 20-day forward returns in > 55% of instances, or the signal's Rank IC remains below 0.015 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: FEDFUNDS fails to predict positive 5-day forward returns in > 65% of instances, or the signal's Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in industrial production (INDPRO) and a 1-month increase in housing units sold (HOUST) signals a strengthening supply chain and demand for durable goods, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of INDPRO and HOUST fails to predict positive 20-day forward returns in > 50% of instances, or the signal's Rank IC remains below 0.01 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in initial unemployment claims (UNRATE) signals a weakening labor market, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: UNRATE fails to predict negative 60-day forward returns in > 75% of instances, or the signal's Rank IC remains below 0.005 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in real disposable personal income (GDPC1) and a 1-month increase in housing units sold (HOUST) signals a strengthening demand for consumer goods and durable goods, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of GDPC1 and HOUST fails to predict positive 20-day forward returns in > 55% of instances, or the signal's Rank IC remains below 0.015 over any 1-year rolling window.
